article.title: The impact of muscle energy technique and aromatherapy on pain, disability, and sleep quality in office workers with nonspecific neck pain: randomized controlled study.
article.authors: Aytar A, Gülşen M, Özen S
article.abstract: The aim of this study was to look at the effects of muscular energy technique method and aromatherapy on pain levels and neck disability in office workers with nonspecific neck pain.
